title: Opinion: Opinion | Why The Current LPG Crisis Is More Than Just A 'Supply Chain' Hiccup
summary_full: In 2013-14, India imported roughly 77% of its crude oil requirements. By 2025, rather than insulating ourselves, we saw that figure climb to over 85%.
summary_public: In 2013-14, India imported roughly 77% of its crude oil requirements. By 2025, rather than insulating ourselves, we saw that figure climb to over 85%.
